tweets.text: "Greed in the end, fails even the greedy"  ~Catheryn Louis https://t.co/oq5mZb7dnC
POV: You just watched our movie https://t.co/j3nh2SA3XB

We made a $300,000,000 movie starring @LoganPaul   with AI in less than 7 days. 

Yes, this is 100% AI. https://t.co/Usll3hGmQC
Some of the designs we made: https://t.co/UjbOB5cyLX

To anyone wondering:

One person did all the visuals and editing in less than a week. 

The sound design was mostly AI-generated, then cleaned up and improved by a second person.

The first pass of the voiceover came from AI and was surprisingly usable, but in the end, Logan Paul stepped in and recorded it himself to bring a real human performance to it.
The world is not ready for what we're about to release.

Thank you @joerogan for the kind words!

And we understand you @michaelmalice , but we don't think we're the first ones to have explosions in a movie. https://t.co/S6VgSje8Dw

We just made a $3,000,000 VFX sequence in just one day. 

Yes, this is 100% AI. https://t.co/roDjQeWAOu

This is great!

The more the world fills up with useless, AI generated content, the more people will crave work that feels thoughtful, human and made with care.

For creators worried about what’s coming next: 

We closed 8 major client projects since Seedream 2.0 was announced the other day. So far, it’s amplifying demand, not diminishing it.

Just one prompt on Seedance 2.0

"Mortal Kombat gameplay footage but the characters are famous world leaders" https://t.co/dNyNfswrnQ
